title: The Future of Everything: What CEOs of Circle, CrowdStrike & More See Coming in 2026
description:
(0:00) Intro

(0:50) Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire on stablecoins post-GENIUS Act, interest rate impact, growth in 2026, and the future of money in an AI world

(52:33) CrowdStrike CEO George Kurtz on cybersecurity in the AI era, most capable hacker nations, and more

(1:17:53) Archer CEO Adam Goldstein on the state of eVTOLs in 2026 and when to expect them

(1:42:27) Crusoe CEO Chase Lochmiller on powering the trillion-dollar AI buildout

On Public, you can invest in stocks, options, bonds, and crypto. Plus, build your own custom index with AI. Get started at https://public.com— investing for those who take it seriously.

analysis.summary: The episode covers the future of various industries, including stablecoins, cybersecurity, eVTOLs, and AI, with insights from CEOs of Circle, CrowdStrike, Archer, and Crusoe. The guests share their expectations for 2026 and the impact of AI on their respective fields. The hosts and guests discuss the potential growth and challenges in these areas.

takeaways.text: AI buildout will require massive power
Cybersecurity is a major concern in AI era
Custom indexes with AI are available
Investing in stocks, options, bonds, and crypto is possible

sentiment.notes: The episode has a positive tone, with guests and hosts discussing the potential growth and opportunities in various industries. However, they also acknowledge the challenges and risks associated with these areas.

notable_moments.description: George Kurtz talks about cybersecurity in AI era
Adam Goldstein shares expectations for eVTOLs
Chase Lochmiller discusses powering AI buildout
